category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Argentina market entry (ENACOM / IRAM).

title.en: China-to-Argentina Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ENACOM / IRAM)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵（ENACOM / IRAM）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣（ENACOM / IRAM）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Argentine ENACOM mandatory homologación (radio and telecom terminal equipment type approval under Ley Argentina Digital 27.078), IRAM electrical safety S-mark certification (IRAM-IEC harmonised standards), EMC requirements under IRAM-IEC harmonised CISPR standards, the Argentine registered importer with CUIT requirement, and the advisory Disposición SIGEN cybersecurity guidelines for connected devices. Argentina uses 220V/50Hz and requires the unique Argentine type-I plug per IRAM 2073, which is distinct from the Australian type-I. CE, FCC, and CCC are not recognised by ENACOM; separate ENACOM homologation is mandatory. MERCOSUR mutual recognition with Brazil for wireless equipment is incomplete.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与阿根廷ENACOM强制型式认可（依据阿根廷数字法27.078对无线电及电信终端设备的型号认证）、IRAM电气安全S-mark认证（IRAM-IEC协调标准）、基于IRAM-IEC协调CISPR标准的EMC要求、阿根廷CUIT注册进口商要求，以及联网设备网络安全指导性Disposición SIGEN准则的差距对照。阿根廷采用220V/50Hz，依据IRAM 2073要求使用独特的阿根廷I型插头（与澳大利亚I型插头不同）。CE、FCC和CCC不被ENACOM承认；须另行取得ENACOM型式认可。阿根廷与巴西在无线设备方面的MERCOSUR相互认可机制尚不完善。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與阿根廷ENACOM強制型式認可（依據阿根廷數位法27.078對無線電及電信終端裝置的型號認證）、IRAM電氣安全S-mark認證（IRAM-IEC協調標準）、基於IRAM-IEC協調CISPR標準的EMC要求、阿根廷CUIT註冊進口商要求，以及聯網裝置網路安全指導性Disposición SIGEN準則的差距對照。阿根廷採用220V/50Hz，依據IRAM 2073要求使用獨特的阿根廷I型插頭（與澳大利亞I型插頭不同）。CE、FCC和CCC不被ENACOM承認；須另行取得ENACOM型式認可。阿根廷與巴西在無線裝置方面的MERCOSUR相互認可機制尚不完善。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ENACOM homologación, IRAM S-mark certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current ENACOM resolutions and disposiciones, IRAM and IRAM-IEC standards, electrical safety and EMC requirements, CUIT importer registration obligations, Argentine plug and voltage requirements, and Spanish labelling rules with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Argentina.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ENACOM型式认可、IRAM S-mark认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向阿根廷发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行ENACOM决议和处置规定、IRAM及IRAM-IEC标准、电气安全和EMC要求、CUIT进口商注册义务、阿根廷插头和电压要求及西班牙语标签规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ENACOM型式認可、IRAM S-mark認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向阿根廷發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行ENACOM決議和處置規定、IRAM及IRAM-IEC標準、電氣安全和EMC要求、CUIT進口商註冊義務、阿根廷插頭和電壓要求及西班牙語標籤規則。

answer_first.en: The main Argentina compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: ENACOM mandatory homologación under Ley Argentina Digital 27.078 — all radio and telecom terminal equipment requires an ENACOM certificate and homologation number on the label before import or sale, with no recognition of FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC approvals; an Argentine-registered importer with a valid CUIT number required for customs clearance; IRAM S-mark electrical safety certification and IRAM-IEC EMC compliance; product adaptation to the unique Argentine type-I plug per IRAM 2073 and 220V/50Hz power system; and Spanish language labelling. MERCOSUR mutual recognition with Brazil for wireless equipment is incomplete. Cybersecurity certification is currently advisory only.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入阿根廷的主要合规差距为：依据阿根廷数字法27.078的ENACOM强制型式认可——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前须取得ENACOM证书并在标签上标注认可编号，不认可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；海关清关须有持有效CUIT编号的阿根廷注册进口商；IRAM S-mark电气安全认证及IRAM-IEC EMC合规；依据IRAM 2073要求对独特阿根廷I型插头及220V/50Hz电源系统的产品适配；以及西班牙语标签要求。阿根廷与巴西在无线设备方面的MERCOSUR相互认可机制尚不完善。网络安全认证目前仅为指导性要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入阿根廷的主要合規差距為：依據阿根廷數位法27.078的ENACOM強制型式認可——所有無線電及電信終端裝置在進口或銷售前須取得ENACOM證書並在標籤上標注認可編號，不認可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；海關清關須有持有效CUIT編號的阿根廷註冊進口商；IRAM S-mark電氣安全認證及IRAM-IEC EMC合規；依據IRAM 2073要求對獨特阿根廷I型插頭及220V/50Hz電源系統的產品適配；以及西班牙語標籤要求。阿根廷與巴西在無線裝置方面的MERCOSUR相互認可機制尚不完善。網路安全認證目前僅為指導性要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
